description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the gradle:4.6-jdk8-alpine Docker image, runs a before_script exporting GRADLE_USER_HOME to the current directory's .gradle folder, and sets the GRADLE_OPTS variable to disable the daemon. Define a single test stage and add eight jobs named test:t1 through test:t8, each with an except rule excluding branches@csui-advprog-2018/lab and an only rule matching the regex /.*tutorial[_-].*N$/ for the corresponding tutorial number. Each job runs the Gradle check task for its tutorial (e.g., gradle :tutorial-1:check for test:t1, gradle :tutorial-2:check for test:t2, etc.), with test:t7 also executing gradle :tutorial-7:jacocoTestReport after its check task. Jobs test:t5, test:t6, test:t7, and test:t8 declare artifacts that upload the contents of /tutorial-5/build/*, /tutorial-6/build/*, /tutorial-7/build/*, and /tutorial-8/build/* respectively. No additional services, caches, or deployment targets are defined.
